name: factcheck.org
affiliation: , Annenberg Public Policy Center at University of Pennsylvania

name: usa today
affiliation: USA Today and the USA Today Network,

name: thejournal.ie factcheck
ratingsystem: true to false, including "can't be verified"

name: check your fact
ratingsystem: true to false

name: vox ukraine
ratingsystem: false to true, including half-true, exaggerated or manipulated

name: stopfake.org
notes: "head (or project-manager) - yevhen fedchenko, director of mohyla school of journalism, co-founder of stopfake; finance director and editor of the website - ruslan deynychenko, co-founder of stopfake; editor in chief of the website - tetiana matychak, co-founder of stopfake; editors of the website - olga yurkova, co-founder of stopfake; anna chournous, artem babak, maria kovalchuk (there are also several ex-editors, who are also co-founders of stopfake); video team - yuriy panin, director of news casts, co-founder of stopfake; margo gontar, an editor and anchor, co-founder of stopfake; alina sugonyako, an editor and anchor, co-founder of stopfake." | http://www.niemanlab.org/2014/06/a-ukrainian-factchecking-site-is-trying-to-spot-fake-photos-in-social-media-and-building-audience/

name: correctiv
ratingsystem: seven-point system, including correct (richtig) unclear or unratable (unklar oder nicht belegbarto). inaccurate statements are rated with pinocchios with noses that grow on a scale from 1 (for minor mistakes, or flüchtigkeitsfehler) to 5 (completely false, or völlig falsch)

name: faktograf.hr
ratingsystem: a five-rating scale, from fact ("fakt") to no f of fact ("ni f od fakta," a pun based on a common croatian expression). promises are also rated on a five-point scale: not rated ("nije ocijenjeno“), commenced ("započeto"), broken ("prekršeno"), partially fulfilled ("djelomično ispunjeno") and fulfilled ("ispunjeno").

name: the washington post
ratingsystem: the pinocchio test: inaccuracies are rated on a 1-4 pinocchio scale. a claim that's received 3 or 4 pinocchios and repeated at least 20 times receives a "bottomless pinocchio." a flip flop receives an upside-down pinocchio. the geppetto checkmark is reserved for claims that are unexpectedly true.

name: faktisk
affiliation: Dagbladet, Verdens Gang (VG), NRK, TV 2, Polaris Media and Amedia,
notes: https://www.faktisk.no/artikler/wq/polaris-media-og-amedia-blir-med-som-eiere-av-faktiskno | http://www.vg.no/nyheter/innenriks/media/vg-dagbladet-og-nrk-gaar-sammen-for-aa-ta-knekken-paa-falske-nyheter/a/23954644/#xtor=cs6-7 | http://journalisten.no/2017/03/faktasjekksamarbeid | previous rating system (until 2021-22): a five-point color-coded system: helt sant (absolutely true -- green); delvis sant (partially true -- yellow); ikke sikkert (not certain -- gray); delvis feil (partially wrong -- orange); helt feil (completely false -- red)

name: snopes
ratingsystem: true, mostly true, mixture, mostly false, false. unproven, outdated, miscaptioned, correct attribution, misattributed, scam, legend, labeled satire, lost legend. (the final category is used for a collection of "unusual and arcane" that snopes calls the repository of lost legends, or troll for short.

name: politifact
ratingsystem: truth-o-meter: true to pants on fire

name: tjekdet
notes: about: https://www.tjekdet.dk/om-os | financial: https://www.tjekdet.dk/oekonomi | as previously presented on mandag morgen: https://web.archive.org/web/20200812002322/https://www.mm.dk/tjekdet/ [ended 7/31/20] | archived version of mandag morgen (old url now redirects): https://web.archive.org/web/20200812002322/https://www.mm.dk/tjekdet/

name: faktabaari
ratingsystem: totta (true) to vaarin (false)

name: africacheck
ratingsystem: eight point, color-coded rating system: correct, mostly correct, unproven, misleading, exaggerated, understated, incorrect and checked. (the "checked" rating is used when multiple claims are fact-checked.)

name: the whistle
ratingsystem: true to false, with additional categories in between.
notes: https://drive.google.com/file/d/0b2f44_rzhukvanjwanhmzmldugc/view: some collaborations with two large tv channels - channel 2 and the public broadcast (kan); on the whistle's website, it says: "the whistle system operates according to the ethics regulations of the press council and the code of ethics of the international network of fact-finding organizations (ifcn)." has the ifcn approved them as a signatory?; https://www.thewhistle.co.il/aboutus

name: verificador de la república
ratingsystem: color-coded system, green to red, with labels: cierto (true), impreciso (imprecise), engañoso (deceptive), and falso (false)

name: t verifica
ratingsystem: falso (false), engañoso (misleading), manipulado (manipulated), sin evidencia (no evidence), falta contexto (missing context), verdadero (true)

name: franceinfo.fr
ratingsystem: “faux” for misinformation

name: taiwan factcheck center
affiliation: , Taiwan Media Watch Foundation (台灣媒體觀察教育基金會), Quality News Development Association (優質新聞發展協會)
ratingsystem: results are generally divided into “true,” “partially false” and “false,” but they don’t always get a rating depending on how complicated or nuanced the fact-check is.

name: raskrinkavanje.me
ratingsystem: rates 16 categories of claims ranging from klikbejta (clickbait) to fake news (lažne vijest).

name: newsmeter
ratingsystem: fact checks claims from social media with no standardized rating system.

name: first check
notes: about: https://firstcheck.in/about-us/ | https://www.ha-asia.com/about-us/ | https://dataleads.co.in/about-us | facbook journalism project: https://www.facebook.com/journalismproject/programs/third-party-fact-checking/innovation-initiative-first-check-health-analytics-asia | ijnet: https://ijnet.org/en/story/key-quotes-asian-journalists-and-doctors-collaborating-fact-check-covid-19-myths-syed-nazakat | poynter: https://www.poynter.org/fact-checking/2020/the-fact-checking-development-grant-has-awarded-22-projects-in-12-countries-meet-the-grant-winners/

name: istinomer
ratingsystem: truth meter: green to red; true to "short legs"
notes: founder: vukosava crnjanski, won ndi’s 2013 democracy award recipients for civic innovation; democracy fund's star truthometer grantee. they have advanced the most in terms of content, impact, innovation, diversity of initiatives. | translation: http://translate.google.com/translate?hl=en&sl=sr&u=https://twitter.com/istinomer&prev=/search%3fq%3dwww.istinomer.rs%26biw%3d1172%26bih%3d639 | http://www.ned.org/where-we-work/central-and-eastern-europe/serbia ; http://bit.ly/1fjynm2 ; http://communityboostr.org/resource/technology-open-institutions-and-accountable-politicians ; http://www.rbf.org/close-up/center-research-transparency-and-accountability

name: factcheck georgia
ratingsystem: fact-meter: true to false

name: el detector
ratingsystem: two rating scales: one for spoken claims and one for media content. speech: verdad (true), falta contexto (context missing), no hay evidencias (no evidence), engañoso (misleading), falso (false). media: auténtico (authentic), fuera de contexto (out of context), engañoso (misleading), manipulado (manipulated), falso (false.)

name: factchecker.in
notes: separate website was created in 2014 after a couple years of content on indiaspend.com

name: equador chequea
ratingsystem: the rating system uses color-coded batteries (green and fully charged to red and fully drained), paired with related descriptions: cierto (true), si, pero (yes, but), instostenible (unsustainable) and falso (false). #falseta is used to label misinformation that spreads virally.

name: 20 minutes fake off
notes: two main authors are anne kerloc, social media editor and deputy editor in chief, and mathilde cousin, reporter and journalist, who has just been hired on a full-time fact-checker job.

name: pravda.org
ratingsystem: rawdziwą ("true"), fałszywą ("false"), manipulację ("manipulation"), nieweryfikowalną ("unverifiable")

name: facta
ratingsystem: true news (notizia vera), satirical news (notizia satirica), false news (notizia falsa), old news (notizia vecchia), modified image (immagine modificata) and image out of context immagine decontestualizzata)

name: poligrafo
ratingsystem: verdadeiro (true); verdadeiro, mas... (true, but...); impreciso (inaccurate); falso (false); pimenta na língua (pepper in language)

name: bufale
ratingsystem: bufala (hoax), disinformazione (misinformation), precisazioni (truthful but clarifications needed), complottismo (twisted to advance a theory based on fear and paranoia), approfondimento (needs deeper study)

name: pagella politica
ratingsystem: policy report card scoreboard: vero (true) to panzana pazzesca (crazy)

name: maldita.es
notes: methodology: https://maldita.es/metodologia-de-maldito-bulo/ site founded in 2014; fact-checking section since 2017.

name: factual
ratingsystem: true to false

name: newtral
ratingsystem: four-point rating scale: true ("verdadero"), half true ("verdad a media"), misleading ("engañoso") and false ("falso").

name: observador
ratingsystem: six-point rating scale: certo ("right"); praticamente certo ("practically right"); esticado ("stretched"); inconclusivo ("inconclusive"); enganador ("misleading"); errado ("incorrect")

name: bolivia verifica
affiliation: 30+ media partners, Universidad Católica Boliviana, San Pablo
ratingsystem: true (verdadero), falso (false), misleading (engañosa), unverifiable ("no verificable")

name: ellinikahoaxes
ratingsystem: αληθεια (true), ψευδες (false), ψευδης ισχυρισμος (false but), μιξη γεγονοτων και παραποιησεων (confused), κινδυνολογια (danger), ψευδοεπιστημη (unfounded), like farming, clickbait

name: chequeado
ratingsystem: verdadero (true) to falso (false)

name: chequea bolivia
ratingsystem: true (verdadera), true but... (verdadero pero...), altered photo (fotomontaje), false (falsa), false but... (falsa pero...), and uncheckable (inchequeable). the rating of misleading (engañosa) was eliminated in august 2019.
notes: media partners (for distribution): los tiempos, opinión.com.bo, radio centro–cochabamba, atb, asociación de periodistas–cochabamba. academic partners: universidad mayor de san simón, universidad católica–cochabamba, universidad san francisco xavier de chuquisaca (chequea bolivia works with the academic partners to teach students about fake news and fact checking. they do not receive financial support )

name: aos fatos
ratingsystem: verdadeiro (real); impreciso (inaccurate); exagerado (exaggerated); distorcido (distorted); contraditório (contradictory); insustentável (unsustainable); falso (false)

name: uol confere
ratingsystem: verdadeiro ("true") to falso ("false")

name: agência pública
ratingsystem: truco! (true) to yeah right (false)

name: health feedback
ratingsystem: articles are rated on a scientific credibility scale that goes from +2 ("very high") to zero ("neutral") to -2 ("very low"). individual claims also receive tags that range from "accurate" or correct" at the high end of the scale to "inaccurate," "incorrect" and "flawed reasoning" at the low end.

name: factchecking.cl
affiliation: , Facultad de Comunicaciones de la Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile
ratingsystem: six-point rating scale, each paired with related facial expressions that appear on a blue emoji-like character: credible ("creíble"), credible, but... ("creíble, pero..."), would be credible, but ... ("sería creíble, pero..."), getting creative ("se puso creativo"), is not credible ("no es creíble"), and science fiction ("ciencia ficción").

name: comprova
ratingsystem: falso (false), enganoso (misleading), alterado digitalmente (digitally altered), imagem legítima (legitimate image), evento legítimo (legitimate event), contexto errado (wrong context), evidência comprovada (proven evidence), evidência insuficiente (insufficient evidence), sem comprovação (unproven), fonte não confiável (untrustworthy source), sátira (satire)
notes: july 2019 partners (24): afp, band tv, band.com.br, bandnews fm, bandnews tv, canal futura, jornal correio, correio do povo, estadão, exame, folha de s. paulo, gaúchazh, gazeta online, jornal do commercio, metro jornal, nexo, nova escola, nsc comunicação, o povo, poder360, rádio bandeirantes, revista piauí, sbt, uol ----- 2018 election partners: afp, band news, band tv, canal futura, correio do povo, exame, folha de s.paulo, gaúchazh, gazeta online, gazeta do povo, jornal do commercio, metro brasil, nexo jornal, nova escola, nsc comunicação, o estadode s.paulo, o povo, poder360, rádio band news fm, rádio bandeirantes, revista piauí, sbt, uol and veja

name: ama llulla
ratingsystem: true ("verdadero"), misleading ("engañoso"), not verifiable ("no verificable"), false (falso)

name: colombiacheck
affiliation: El País, Vanguardia, La Cola de Rata, El Colombiano, El Espectador, La Opinión, El Universal, Pacífica (F.M. 89.7), El Nuevo Oriente, Tu Barco, El Tiempo, Canalrcn, Noticias Caracol, RCN Radio, Noticias Uno (contribution + distribution), Universidad Pontificia Bolivariana, Universidad de Ibagué, Universidad Autónoma de Bucaramanga, Universidad de Manizales, Universidad Santiago de Cali, Universidad del Valle (contribution + distribution)
ratingsystem: true (verdad), true but (verdad pero...), questionable (cuestionable), uncheckable (inchequeable), and false (falso)

name: uycheck
ratingsystem: verdadero (true) to ridiculo (ridiculous)
notes: has a submission page for people to submit statements/facts to be checked. | http://www2.espectador.com/1v4_contenido.php?id=300480&sts=1

name: effect cocuyo
ratingsystem: uses multiple tags with a green-to-red color-coding system to indicate degrees. tags include true ("verdadero"), imprecise ("impreciso"), debatable ("discutible"), doubtful ("dudoso"), untenable ("insostenible"), inconsistent ("inconsistente"), exaggerated ("exagerado"), misleading ("engañoso"), false ("falso") and uncheckable ("inchequeable").

name: animal político
ratingsystem: verdadero (true) to ridiculo (ridiculous)

name: factnameh
ratingsystem: six color-coded ratings amplified by the facial expressions of fact-nameh's mascot "mirza," who is "accurate and impartial and fair." mirza's expressions range from a contented smile for factual statements that prove true to outrage for statements that are "so false and ridiculous that even a cooked chicken would laugh."

name: agence science presse
ratingsystem: true (vrai) to false (faux)

name: decrypteurs
ratingsystem: true ("vrai"), false ("faux") and watch out ("attention")
notes: jeff yates’ “inspecteur viral” posts from before feb. 2019 are archived  at https://ici.radio-canada.ca/jeffyates | methodology: https://ici.radio-canada.ca/decrypteurs/en-vedette/document/nouvelles/article/1166831/decrypteurs-methodologie-verifications-faits-desinformation

name: doğruluk payı
ratingsystem: for its "claim control" (i̇ddia kontrolü), the site uses its "truth meter" (doğruluk payı kadranı), which ranges from "a share of truth" (doğruluk payı vardır) to "no share truth" (doğruluk payı yoktur). for its social media verification (doğrulama), the findings are true (doğru), false (yanliş), partially (kismen) and uncertainty (kismen).
notes: 87 politicians, meter shows each's "average" truthfullness. about the project: http://ortakgelecek.org/en/projeler/ | http://www.todayszaman.com/monday-talk_turkish-politifacts-editor-political-actors-should-know-we-are-watching-them_383636.html

name: teyit
ratingsystem: color-coded boxes labeled true ("doğru"), false ("yanlış"), mixed ("karma") or uncertain ("belirsiz")

name: lead stories
ratingsystem: false, mostly false, unproven, mostly true and true
notes:
lead stories uses the trendolizer™ engine to monitor the internet and look for newly trending content. it features lists of websites that feature dubious content and automatically collect stories tagged with fake news related hashtags on social media (#hoax, #fakenews, #fake...). lead stories serves to provide articles debunking trending fake stories that haven't been debunked elsewhere yet -- particularly at notable fact-checking outlets. they do not write articles to confirm that something is true, but rather soley if something is false. 

https://leadstories.com/about.html + https://leadstories.com/how-we-work.html

name: news mobile
notes: how to burst fake news! (4/3/2018) http://newsmobile.in/articles/2018/04/03/spot-fake-news/ | the five mantras for fact checking (3/5/2018): http://newsmobile.in/articles/2018/03/05/the-five-mantras-for-fact-checking/ | why we believe fact checking is important (12/16/2017): http://newsmobile.in/articles/2017/12/16/why-we-believe-fact-checking-is-important/

name: mygopen
ratingsystem: ratings include misunderstanding, fake picture/video, misleading, scam, and fake news

name: newschecker.in
ratingsystem: misleading and false

name: factly
notes: contacted: dubbudu: co-convenor at national campaign for people's right to information, founder at factly, trustee at the lakshya foundation, co-founder, director at abhyaas edu corp, co-convenor at united forum for rti campaign - ufrti, former co-founder at bhumi, worked at oracle, studied at nit warangal. other notes: "we do not have any formal association or alignment with any partisan organization. however, we have a consulting agreement with the local government in telangana where we help them open up data. we do not have any formal association with any media company though quite a few of them republish our content as it is 'cc by sa'. we have helped the 'accountability research center' at the american university with data analysis help in the past."

name: india today
ratingsystem: a system of crows called "jhooth bole kauwa kaate" (translated: when you lie, the crow will caw.) the number of crows determines the intensity of the lie: 1 crow is half true;  2 crows is mostly lies;  3 crows is absolutely false.

name: youturn
ratingsystem: true, fake, mix, sarcasm, misleading

name: factcrescendo
ratingsystem: false, partly false, false headline, true

name: rumor scanner
ratingsystem: সত্য (true), আংশিক সত্য (partially true), মিথ্যা (false), বিভ্রান্তিকর (confusing), যাচাই যোগ্য নয়। (not verifiable), অপ্রমাণিত (unproven)

name: climate feedback
ratingsystem: articles are rated on a scientific credibility scale that goes from +2 ("very high") to zero ("neutral") to -2 ("very low"). individual claims also receive tags that range from "accurate" or correct" at the high end of the scale to "inaccurate," "incorrect" and "flawed reasoning" at the low end.

name: south asia check
notes: former editor: mohan mainali, mohanmainali@gmail.com (departed 2020 to do long-form stories for kantipur publications)

name: re_baltica
ratingsystem: uses a standardized scale with five ratings: truth, close to the truth, half-truth, rather wrong, or false.

name: mediawise
ratingsystem: legit. needs context, doctored

name: ghanafact
ratingsystem: false, mixture, false headline, true, not eligible, satire, opinion, prank generator, not rated

name: fakt yoxla
ratingsystem: true ("doğru"), mostly true ("əsasən doğru"), half true ("yarı doğru"),  mostly false ("əsasən yanlış"), false ("yanlış"),  lie ("yalan"), manipulation of facts ("faktlarla manipulyasiya”),  without verdict (“qərarsız”), analysis (“analiz”)
notes: gf6 attendee: akif gurbanov (chairman), demokratik təşəbbüslər i̇nstitutu (institute for democratic initiatives, idi): http://www.idi-aze.org/

name: factcheck.kz
ratingsystem: scale from true (правда) to false (ложь), including manipulation, half-true and no verdict.
notes: on the website, they've written: "any person can co-participate in the project by proposing a fact for verification, as well as his version of the verification procedure, the basis of evidence." i followed up about whether or not they were crowd-sourcing content and what the process for verification would be, if they were. this was their response, "at the moment we are not receiving fact-checks from public. but our audience could ask us to fact-check any information they interested in. so we have some articles that was initiated by our readers (like this one https://factcheck.kz/glavnoe/pravda-izdannaya-kisi-kniga-rasula-zhumaly-soderzhit-narusheniya-avtorskogo-prava/ ). also we are going to develop community of active reader to involve them to fact-checking and creating content with a little help of us." according to the website, "any person can co-participate in the project by proposing a fact for verification, as well as his version of the verification procedure, the basis of evidence." on the "about us" page, fackcheck.kz states, "in our work, we focus on the principles of the international facts-checking network (ifcn)."

name: delfi melo detektorius
ratingsystem: false ("melas"), partially false ("iš dalies melas"), partially true ("iš dalies tiesa"), true ("tiesa")
notes: methodology: https://www.delfi.lt/news/melo-detektorius/?page=metodologija | parent company, postimees grupp: https://www.postimeesgrupp.ee/homepage/ | about/contacts: https://www.delfi.lt/news/melo-detektorius/?page=apie

name: the ferret
ratingsystem: a six-point scale from "true" to "ffs!" (for facts’ sake!), meaning "the claim is baseless, ridiculous and/or logically impossible"

name: channel 4 news
ratingsystem: fact to fiction
notes: published four total fact-checks in 2008 and 2009 before making it a regular blog

name: les décodeurs
ratingsystem: ratings include imprecise (imprécis), diversion (détourné), false (faux)

name: factcheck.bg
ratingsystem: true (вярно), false (невярно), misleading (подвеждащо), no evidence (няма доказателства)

name: alt news
notes: share the facts: approved in 2017 by ba/er, but no widget maker or widgets. 6/4/17 first post article: "founded by sinha and an anonymous co-founder known in the social media world as unofficial sususwamy..." sinha is a software engineer http://www.firstpost.com/india/how-alt-news-is-trying-to-take-on-the-fake-news-ecosystem-in-india-3513879.html

name: verificat
ratingsystem: true ("verdader"), misleading ("enganyós"), false ("fals"), unverifiable ("no comprovabl")
notes: 3 founders were grads from universitat autònoma de barcelona (uab) | methodology: http://www.verificat.cat/metodologia

name: real or not myanmar
notes: about: https://www.realornotmm.info/about-us/?lang=en | address: https://www.facebook.com/myanmarido/ | from a report: https://www.apc.org/en/blog/apc-members-2017-real-or-not-news-verification-and-fact-checking-facebook-page-myanmar | bot: http://miradio.com.mm/news/mido-introduces-fact-checking-messenger-bot

name: nieuwscheckers
affiliation: , Leiden University's journalism and new media program
ratingsystem: true, partly true, partly false, false, hoax and not possible to check.
notes: contacted. claims to "commit itself to the  principles of the international fact-checking network (ifcn) of the poynter institute." follow up with alexios. staff of 3, although the two professors regularly assign fact-checking as coursework for the ma students in their journalism program.

name: nu.nl
ratingsystem: true to false, with additional designations of largely false, not true and no evidence.
notes: the organizataion follows the bordeaux code which articulates rules for editorial independence. | https://www.nu.nl/nucheckt/4778466/nucheckt-meld-mogelijk-nepnieuws-facebook.html, https://www.nu.nl/blog/4509129/redactieblog-waarom-nunl-helpt-met-factchecken-facebook.html

name: fast check cl
ratingsystem: real (real), fake (fake), imprecise (impreciso), uncheckable (inchequeable)

name: soch fact check
notes: sister sites: soch videos: https://www.sochvideos.com/ and soch writing: https://www.sochwriting.com/

name: pesacheck
ratingsystem: true or false, signified by a check mark or a red "x"

name: cek fakta - liputan 6
ratingsystem: large color-coded ratings at the end of each fact check include fakta (or "fact"), which appears in green, and salash ("incorrect") and "hoax," both of which appear in red.
notes: methods + staff: https://www.liputan6.com/info/metode-cek-fakta | parent: https://www.kmkonline.co.id/ | about: https://www.liputan6.com/info/tentang-kami | rating system evolved sometime before july 2018 (more rating in text form back then). the ownership of the liputan6 news portal is confusing. its primary owner since 2016 is pt liputan enam dot com, a subsidiary of the digital media company pt kreatif media karya (kmk). that arrangement was the result of a 2016 regulatory change. prior to that, the portal was a direct subsidiary of kmk, which in turn was a subsidiary of pt elang mahkota teknologi tbk (emtek). and emtek is a company that was created in 2012 as a spin-off of liputan6 sctv (surya citra televisi), the television station from which the news portal originally got its name. before 2012, liputan6.com was the tv station's website. whew! [see about page: https://www.liputan6.com/info/tentang-kami] | oldest archived page (2018): https://web.archive.org/web/20180731054750/https://www.liputan6.com/cek-fakta

name: knack magazine
ratingsystem: four-point rating system: true, rather true, rather untrue, and false

name: ekspress meedia / eesti päevaleht
ratingsystem: six-point scale: naeruväärne (ridiculous), vale (false), pigem vale (mostly false), nii ja naa (more or less), pigem tõsi (mostly true), tõsi (true)

name: faktoje.al
ratingsystem: a four-point "fact-o-metër": true (e vërtetë), half-true (gjysmë e vërtetë), untrue (e pavërtetë) and unategorized (pa kategori), along with a color-coded cartoon donkey. promises are rated fulfilled (të mbajtura) and unfulfilled (të pambajtura).

name: dubawa
ratingsystem: true, mostly true, mostly false, false or misleading. misleading statements are described further: more context needed/wrong context or insufficient evidence. analysis is used for claims that cannot be rated.

name: france 24 - les observateurs
ratingsystem: rating system: “faux” or “infox” (“fake news”) for misinformation.

name: tirto id
notes: check data is the data-driven fact-checking project of tirto.id, a media company based in jakarta, indonesia. launched in 2017, check data uses publically availible government and corporate data to conduct live fact-checks and longform analyses of political events. tirto.id is personally funded by the founding members, sapto anggoro (ceo), teguh budi santoso (cco), and nur samsi (cto). the fact-checking site grew in prominance during the 2017 jakarta elections.

name: patikrinta 15min
ratingsystem: tiesometras ("truth-meter"), from tiesa (true), to netiesa (false)

name: la voce
ratingsystem: true ("vero"), partially true ("parzialmente vero"), partially false ("parzialmente falso) and false ("falso").
notes:
volunteers; supported with individual contributions; methods/staff: http://www.lavoce.info/fact-checking-de-lavoce/ lorenzo borga: "italian website focused on economics and politics founded by tito boeri in 2002." alexios: "la voce is a reputable website hosted by one of the country’s most famous economists. and they’ve done fact-checking on and off for years"
methods/staff: http://www.lavoce.info/fact-checking-de-lavoce/ 10/17/2019 email:

name: media foundation for west africa
ratingsystem: entirely true, mostly true, half true, mostly false, completely false, true but misleading, not verifiable

name: open.online
ratingsystem: labels include: falso! (false!), smentita (denial), bufala (hoax), disinformazione (disinformation), inconcludenti (inconclusive), ingannevole (misleading), teorie di compltto (complex theories), esagerato (exaggerated), non è proprio così (not quite the case), attenzionne! (attention), facciam il punt (let's make the punt), vero (true)

name: libération - checknews
notes: about checknews: https://www.liberation.fr/checknews/about/ | checknews announcement (may 2017): https://www.liberation.fr/desintox/2017/05/03/posez-vos-questions-sur-le-debat-desintox-y-repondra_1567003 | animated destinox fact-checks: http://28minutes.arte.tv/blog/desintox/ | old social media links: https://www.facebook.com/desintoxliberation + https://twitter.com/libedesintox | http://culture-rp.com/2015/02/09/quest-ce-que-desintox-a-liberation/

name: mala espina check
ratingsystem: true (verdadero), true, but ... (verdadero, pero…), false (falso), imprecise (impreciso), deceptive (engañoso)

name: maharat foundation
ratingsystem: tracks both statements and campaign promises. statements are rated on a scale including "incorrect," "partially correct," and "correct," while promises are rated "stuck," "in process", "check," or "not achieved."

name: krypometri
ratingsystem: the krypometër is based on an albanian expression (“na krypi tu na rrejt" -- or "he salted us!”), which equates lying to the amount of salt (kripë) one can add to food before it becomes inedible. ratings range from one salt shaker with a checkmark (indicating true) to as many five salt shakers (meaning a total lie). an upside-down salt shaker indicates a political flip flop and two salt shakers on a scale means no determination has yet been made.

name: les surligneurs
ratingsystem: claims are tagged with terms such as "problématique" (problematic) "à nuancer" (to be qualified), "illégal" (illagal), "impossible sauf si..." (impossible, unless...), "faux"  (false), "inutile" (usless), "anticipé" (anticipated), "existe déjà" (already exists)

name: la silla vacía
ratingsystem: "true,” “false,” “true but…,” “debatable,” “rushed,” “exaggerated,” “misleading” or "uncheckable."

name: kompas.com
ratingsystem: items are rated facts ("fakta"), hoax ("hoaks") or, if there's an element of truth, off-base ("sesat").

name: jtbc
ratingsystem: true to false

name: saheeh masr
notes: operates entirely as a facebook page | https://www.poynter.org/fact-checking/2019/religious-ideologies-and-authoritarian-regimes-the-challenges-faced-by-virtual-newsrooms-of-arab-fact-checkers/

name: factcheck gambia
ratingsystem: false, mixture, false headline, true, partly true, misleading, satire, exaggerated, understated, unproven

name: buharimeter
ratingsystem: achieved to not achieved

name: people's check
ratingsystem: applies seven ratings: true, false, mostly true, mostly false, misleading, more context needed/wrong context, insufficient evidence, analysis

name: icir factcheck
ratingsystem: true, misleading, partly false, false

name: zimfact
notes: voluntary media council of zimbabwe www.vmcz.co.zw | https://www.mediasupport.org/zimbabwe-sees-first-fact-checking-platform/

name: jachai (যাচাই, “verify”)
ratingsystem: true (সত্য), untrue (অসত্য), confusing (বিভ্রান্তিকর), unverified (অপ্রমাণিত), mixed (বিমিশ্রিত), mostly true (অধিকাংশ সত্য), mostly false (অধিকাংশ মিথ্যা)
notes: note: double a in original name appears in social media links, but dropped elsewhere because unusual transliteration caused confusion. | research: https://www.researchgate.net/publication/328758129_fact-checking_initiatives_in_bangladesh_india_and_nepal_a_study_of_user_engagement_and_challenges | daily star: https://www.thedailystar.net/opinion/perspective/combating-our-fake-news-problem-1558219

name: factwire fact check
notes: closure (6/10/22): https://www.factwire.org/%e5%82%b3%e7%9c%9f%e7%a4%be%e5%81%9c%e6%ad%a2%e9%81%8b%e4%bd%9c%e8%81%b2%e6%98%8e/ or https://web.archive.org/web/*/https://www.factwire.org/%e5%82%b3%e7%9c%9f%e7%a4%be%e5%81%9c%e6%ad%a2%e9%81%8b%e4%bd%9c%e8%81%b2%e6%98%8e/ | variety article about closing (6/10/22):  https://variety.com/2022/biz/asia/hong-kong-factwire-closed-1235290416/

name: annie lab
affiliation: , University of Hong Kong's Journalism & Media Studies Centre and the Asian Network of News and Information Educators  (ANNIE)
ratingsystem: false, misleading, no evidence, investigation, explainer, verified

name: lokmat fact check
ratingsystem: no standardized rating system.

name: logically india
ratingsystem: true, partly true, misleading, false, unverifiable
notes: ???: "logically employs the world’s largest team of dedicated fact-checkers." ... "the largest team of dedicated fact checkers on the planet."

name: dailyo fact check
ratingsystem: a system of crows called "jhooth bole kauwa kaate" (translated: when you lie, the crow will caw.) the number of crows determines the intensity of the lie: 1 crow is half true;  2 crows is mostly lies;  3 crows is absolutely false.

name: aajtak fact check
ratingsystem: a system of crows called "jhooth bole kauwa kaate" (translated: when you lie, the crow will caw.) the number of crows determines the intensity of the lie: 1 crow is half true;  2 crows is mostly lies;  3 crows is absolutely false.
notes: india today group launches medium clone dailyo (9/25/2014) https://www.medianama.com/2014/09/223-india-today-dailyo/

name: times fact check
ratingsystem: most claims are rated true of false. "fake" and other such labels appear in the verdicts of different kinds of misleading information.
notes: links to fact-checking sections on different times internet properties: https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/times-fact-check/about-us

name: medcom.id cek fakta
ratingsystem: based on first draft's categories of misinformation: satire (atau parodi), misleading content (konten menyesatkan), imposter content (konten tiruan), fabricated content (konten palsu), false connection (koneksi yang salah), false context (konteks keliru), manipulated content (konten manipulasi)

name: mafindo's turnbackhoax.id
ratingsystem: uses various labels to flag content, from right ("benar"), wrong ("salah"), slander or smear ("fitnah"), and clarification ("klarifikasi").
notes: https://www.facebook.com/groups/fafhh | earliest page in internet archive: https://web.archive.org/web/20200813180307/https://turnbackhoax.id/2015/07/

name: times indonesia cek fakta
ratingsystem: labels include “misleading content,” “false content,” “manipulated content,” “fabricated content,” and “hoaks”

name: tech 4 peace
ratingsystem: labels include fake post, warning, clarification, important, urgent, watch out, attention

name: infact fact check
ratingsystem: uses the fij rating system: accurate (正確); mostly accurate (ほぼ正確); misleading (ミスリード); inaccurate (不正確); unfounded (根拠不明); false (誤り); fake/fabrication (虚偽); suspend (判定留保); ineligible (検証対象外)

name: the mainichi shimbun fact check (ファクトチェック)
ratingsystem: uses the fij rating system: accurate (正確); mostly accurate (ほぼ正確); misleading (ミスリード); inaccurate (不正確); unfounded (根拠不明); false (誤り); fake/fabrication (虚偽); suspend (判定留保); ineligible (検証対象外)

name: factcheck initiative japan
ratingsystem: accurate (正確); mostly accurate (ほぼ正確); misleading (ミスリード); inaccurate (不正確); unfounded (根拠不明); false (誤り); fake/fabrication (虚偽); suspend (判定留保); ineligible (検証対象外)
notes: current media partners https://fij.info/en/media-partners | board members and advisors: https://fij.info/en/board | guidelines: https://fij.info/en/guidelines

name: akeed, the jordanian media credibility monitor
fact check mongolia
ratingsystem: three color-coded symbols -- a green checkmark, a yellow explanation mark, and a rex "x" -- that are paired with 12 explanatory labels ranging from true to false.

name: rappler "fact checks" and "fast facts"
notes: contacted. rappler was founded by three groups: newsbreak, hatchd and dolphin fire. funding for the start-up was subsequently brought in by these groups and their founders. rappler is a media organization registered in the phillipines and indonesia. rappler was founded in 2012 through a partnership between a disbanded media outlet, a tech incubator, and a venture capital firm. rappler has since recieved funding from the omidyar network and north base media, an investment firm. rappler's fact-checking enterprise gained prominence during the 2016 national elections. rappler generates revenue through advertising and branded content. fact-checking appears prominently within the newsbreak section, with tags such as —“fact check,” “fast facts” and “rappler iq. rappler started with 12 people in 2012 and grew quickly to an 80-member organization in a year.

name: no rumors
notes: analysis of 1,000 rumors: http://norumors.net/?articles=1000rumors | scoop, feb. 2018: https://observers.france24.com/en/20180214-fake-speech-ivanka-trump-saudis-sex

name: sisa week "issue and fact"
ratingsystem: no standardized rating system.

name: the jeonbuk daily news (전북일보)
ratingsystem: no standardized rating system.

name: the300 fact check
ratingsystem: ratings include 사실 (true), 대체로 사실 (mostly true), 절반의 사실 (half true), 대체로 사실 아님 (mostly not true) and 전혀 사실 아님 (not at all true).

name: newstof
ratingsystem: uses a modified version of politifact's truth-o-meter, with ratings including 진실 (true), 대체로 진실 (mostly true), 절반의 진실 (half-true), 대체로 거짓 (mostly false), 거짓 (false) and 판단 보류 (pending).

name: sbs news 사실은 ("actually")
ratingsystem: a system of color-coded pinnochios ranging from true to false. the rating image's nose grows as the scale moves toward false, and pinnochio develops visible sweat drops.

name: snu factcheck
affiliation: Multiple news partners., Seoul National University Institute of Communications Research
ratingsystem: scale ranges from "reality" (사실) to "lie" (거짓)

name: ohmyfact (오마이팩트)
ratingsystem: reported conclusions amplified by reader votes using a six-point pinocchio (피노키오) scale.

name: sure and share center
affiliation: Thai News Agency (Mass Communication Organization of Thailand),
ratingsystem: “fake! don't share” (มั่ว อย่าแชร์), “sure! can share” (ชัวร์ แชร์ได้) and partly true, shouldn't share yet (จริงบางส่วน ยังไม่ควรแชร์)

name: metafact
ratingsystem: affirmative, uncertain, negative, not enough experts

name: aap factcheck
ratingsystem: true, mostly true, somewhat true, misleading, ambiguous, mostly false, false
notes: new owners plan to save fact-checking arm: https://www.theguardian.com/australia-news/2020/jun/05/aap-newswire-saved-closure-job-losses-peter-tonagh

name: stuff's "the whole truth"
affiliation: Stuff Limited, Māori Television, Pacific Media Network,

name: medizin transparent
ratingsystem: uses 1 to 3 color-coded thumbs, green for yes, orange for a little and red for no: ja möglicherweise (yeah, maybe, or one green thumb up); ja wahrscheinlich (yeah, probably, or two green thumbs up); ja (yes, or three green thumbs up); ja möglicherweise ein bisschen (yes, maybe a little, or one orange thumb sideways); ja wahrscheinlich ein bisschen (yes, probably a little, or two orange thumbs  sideways); ja ein bisschen (yes a little, or three orange thumbs  sideways); nein möglicherweise nicht (no, maybe not, or one orange thumb down); nein wahrscheinlich nicht (no, probably not, or two orange thumbs down); no (no, or three orange thumbs down); wissenschaftliche belege fehlen (there is a lack of scientific evidence, with an empty folder)

name: istinomjer.ba
ratingsystem: statements that are fact-checked are rated true ("istinita"), half-true ("poluistina") or false ("neistinite"). they also can be rated as consistent ("dosljednim") or inconsistent (nedosljednim) with past statements. promises are rated on a scale from unfulfilled ("neispunjena") to fulfilled ("ispunjena").
notes: this is the second website to be developed in the region. not as rich as the serbian one, but has made impact in bosnia’s 2010 elections and subsequently. why not is a program developed for government accountability |  http://communityboostr.org/node/57?cb=en, http://www.balkaneu.com/ibna-interview-dalio-sijah-editor-portal-istinomjer/, http://www.movements.org/case-study/entry/building-a-movement-in-bosnia-and-herzegovina/, http://techchange.org/2012/08/03/technology-for-accountability-seeing-the-wood-for-the-trees/

name: raskrinkavanje
ratingsystem: uses 15 ratings for the articles it fact-checks, plus list of unreliable media sources that are labeled “red flag” or “high risk.”

name: demagog
ratingsystem: pravda (true) to nepravda (false)
notes: inspired by politifact and factcheck.org; not financially linked to any political party or group; one of the managers is a professor. they have three managers and several "trainee" volunteers.

name: detektor
notes: news about 2019 format change: https://www.dr.dk/presse/detektor-hopper-fra-skaermen-til-radioen-og-paa-drdk | earlier shows: https://www.dr.dk/tv/se/detektor-tv | https://www.dr.dk/om-dr/nyheder/nu-faar-detektor-ogsaa-en-norsk-udgave: "dr had premiere of 'detector' in 2011 - first as a radio show from january 5th and from 18th of october that year also on television, where thomas buch-andersen was from 2011 to 2016. today it is mette vibe utzon, there are talks and facts on dr2 most thursday evenings." [google translate]

name: luipresident.fr
affiliation: , Ecole Supérieure de Journalisme de Lille (ESJ-Lille)
ratingsystem: fulfilled to broken

name: infomigrants #factcheck
affiliation: France Médias Monde (France), Deutsche Welle (Germany), ANSA Italy),

name: notre-planete.info fake news
ratingsystem: color-coded tags for the claims it reviews, such as "idée recue" (a widely held belief), "faux scoop" (a false scoop) and "fake news"

name: "hart aber fair" faktencheck (hard but fair fact check)
melu detektors (truth teller)
notes: previous rating system: uses five ratings, which range from patiesība ("truth") and panikas celšana ("panic-mongering").

name: vistinomer
ratingsystem: statements are rated on a four-point scale: untrue, half-true, true, inconsistent. political promises are rated on a five-point scale: unfulfilled, partially fulfilled, fulfilled, in progress, inconsistent.
notes: metamorphosis is an independent, nonpartisan and nonprofit foundation based in skopje, macedonia. its mission is to contribute to the development of democracy and increase the quality of life through innovative use and sharing of knowledge.

name: fakenews.pl
ratingsystem: prawda ("truth"); w większości prawda ("mostly true"); manipulacja ("manipulation"); satyra / żart ("satire / joke"); w większości fałsz ("mostly false"); scam / oszustwo ("scam"); fałsz ("falsehood"); nieweryfikowalne ("unverifiable"); brak dowodów  ("without evidence")

name: oko.press's prawda czy fałsz ("true or false")
ratingsystem: the "eye," a meter with six levels from true to false, including "bruised fałszomierz" for a statement that is nonsense.

name: dignitas
ratingsystem: verdicte, or verdicts for an aserțiune (a claim or assertion): fals (false); în general fals (generally false); mixt (mixed); în general adevărat (generally true); adevărat (true). for a răzgîndire (flip-flop): răzgîndire (flip-flop); răzgîndire parțială (half-flop); nu este răzgîndire (not a flip-flop). for a promisiune (promise):  încălcată (broken); blocată (stalled); îndeplinită parțial (partially kept); îndeplinită cu întîrziere (kept, but late); îndeplinită (kept). and for all categories: niciunul (none, or not yet determined); indecidabil (indeterminable).

name: raskrikavanje (serbia)
ratingsystem: assertions and articles are labeled: political promotion, or propaganda (“politička promocija"), satire and humor ("satira i humor“), clickbait ("klikbejt"), hidden advertising ("skriveno reklamiranje“"), error ("greška"), bias ("pristrasnost"), conspiracy theory ("teorija zavere"), pseudoscience ("pseudonauka"), manipulating facts ("manipulisanje činjenicama"), disinformation ("dezinformacija"), fake news ("lažna vest"), censorship ("cenzura"), groundless ("neutemeljeno")

name: demagog
ratingsystem: pravda (true) to nepravda (false)

name: el objetivo
ratingsystem: true to false

name: polétika
ratingsystem: rates promises with a series of emoticons indicating whether an issue has been addressed, the concreteness of proposals and the candidates' track record on the topic.

name: slovo i dilo ("word and deed")
ratingsystem: promises rated completed, failed and in progress.

name: bez brehni (без брехні, or "without lies")
ratingsystem: five-point scale from true ("правда") to fake ("фейк")

name: bbc reality check
ratingsystem: true, partly true, misleading, false, unverifiable
notes: ???: "logically employs the world’s largest team of dedicated fact-checkers." ... "the largest team of dedicated fact checkers on the planet."

name: eltoque defacto
ratingsystem: no standardized rating system.

name: conpruebas
ratingsystem: four-rating scale: true ("verdadero"), misleading ("engañoso"), false ("falso"), without proof ("sin pruebas")

name: fáctica
ratingsystem: true ( verdadero), insufficient data (sin datos), false (falso o ¡bulo! ), misleading (engañoso), imprecise (impreciso)

name: verificado
ratingsystem: true, false, misleading

name: escenario tlaxcala's ficciones informativas ("informative fictions")
ratingsystem: five-point rating scale: falso (false), verdadero (true), engañoso (misleading), absurdo (absurd), and improbable (improbable).

name: az fact check
ratingsystem: star rating: 0-4 stars

name: sacramento bee fact check
ratingsystem: true to outright lie

name: truth or fiction
ratingsystem: rating include truth, fiction , reported to be truth, reported to be fiction, unproven, truth & fiction, previously truth, now ended, now resolved, disputed, pending investigation

name: 9news truth test
ratingsystem: true to unprovable

name: news4jax trust index
ratingsystem: three-point, color-coded rating system: it's true (green), be careful (yellow), not true (red)

name: news 6 trust index
ratingsystem: three-point, color-coded rating system: it's true (green), be careful (yellow), not true (red)

name: gazette fact checker
ratingsystem: a to f

name: michigan fact squad
ratingsystem: four ratings, from "no foul" to "flagrant foul"
notes: original site (michigantruthsquad.com) now redirects to channel on bridge; had its own twitter and facebook feeds, now inactive; the bridge's fact-checkers also collaborate frequently with public media's michigan radio: https://www.michiganradio.org/term/truth-squad earlier truth squad posts: http://bridgemi.com/category/truth-squad/ | http://www.cjr.org/united_states_project/michigan_bridge_magazine.php and http://bridgemi.com/2014/02/heads-up-politicians-the-michigan-truth-squad-is-back/

name: local 4 trust index
ratingsystem: three-point, color-coded rating system: it's true (green), be careful (yellow), not true (red)

name: 5 eyewitness news truth test
ratingsystem: truth test: a-f
notes: "how we grade political ads in truth test" http://kstp.com/article/stories/s2770921.shtml

name: news 4 fact check
ratingsystem: true to false

name: target 8 fact check
affiliation: KOMU-TV, Missouri School of Journalism at the University of Missouri

name: 4 investigates fact check
ratingsystem: accurate, misleading
notes: ramirez has led 4 investigates team since 2011 and worked at other stations; he also was once communications director for a mayor

name: newsweek fact check
ratingsystem: true, mostly true, half true, mostly false and false

name: gossip cop
ratingsystem: zero to 10 on a "real" to "rumor" scale.

name: nbc's fact check
notes: "trump tracker" (promise checker) via internet archive: https://web.archive.org/web/20190828034715/https://www.nbcnews.com/feature/donald-trump-tracker | 2016 fact-checking page: http://nbcnews.com/factcheck

name: cbs 17 truth tracker and digging deeper
the frontier fact checks
ratingsystem: true, mostly true, mixed, true, mostly false, false

name: news 8 "ad watch"
notes: see collection in basecamp for archival links

name: kprc trust index
ratingsystem: three-point, color-coded rating system: it's true (green), be careful (yellow), not true (red)

name: ksat trust index
ratingsystem: three-point, color-coded rating system: it's true (green), be careful (yellow), not true (red)

name: 10 news trust index
ratingsystem: three-point, color-coded rating system: it's true (green), be careful (yellow), not true (red)

name: verify
notes: first verify, 7/8/16 at democratic convention:  https://www.facebook.com/watch/?v=10154387982974516&t=20 [https://www.niemanlab.org/2016/08/where-does-local-tv-news-fit-in-the-digital-age-tegna-a-year-separated-from-gannett-has-some-ideas/] | https://www.poynter.org/fact-checking/2018/tegna-asks-viewers-what-do-you-want-to-know-about-the-news/ | former national reporter jason puckettv (dms open: https://twitter.com/jasonpucketttv) | plans for 2021: https://www.tegna.com/tegna-expands-verify-to-stop-the-spread-of-disinformation-announces-appointment-of-managing-editor/

name: news 3 reality check
ratingsystem: true, misleading, needs clarification or false
notes: previous fact-checkers: colin benedict, 2004-07 (now vp of news for morgan murphy media); jessica arp, 2007-19 (former assistant news director and chief political reporter; now at u of wisc. foundation: jesslynngreen@gmail.com, m. 608-332-9453); political reporter amy reid, 2019-???

name: reverso
ratingsystem: true ("verdadero"), falso ("false"), misleading ("engañosa"), unprovable ("no se puede probar")

name: agência lupa
ratingsystem: falso (false); contraditório (contradictory); verdadeiro (true); ainda é cedo para dizer (it is too early to say); exagerado (exaggerated); subestimado (underestimated); insustentável (unsubstantiated); verdadeiro, mas (true, but); de olho (watching/monitoring)

name: fato ou fake ("fact or fake")
notes: preto no branco: https://blogs.oglobo.globo.com/preto-no-branco/ | é isso mesmo: https://blogs.oglobo.globo.com/eissomesmo/ | cristina tardáguila ran preto no branco before she founded agência lupa.

name: el polígrafo
ratingsystem: el poligrafo meter: verdadero (true) to falso (false)

name: biobiochile notas fakenews, santiago, chile
ratingsystem: false (falso), under investigation (en investigación),  probable (probable), true (verdad)
notes: distribution partners: international- dw, afp, rfi, cnnchile, perfil, france 24 national- atacama en línea, el día, el centro, la discusión, diario aysén, el pingüino, prensa antártica, nos, tarreo

name: chequeando
ratingsystem: falso (false), true (verdad), sometimes just a headline if there is some uncertainty

name: el dínamo's chequeo
ratingsystem: false (falso), imprecise (imprecio)

name: fake news report
ratingsystem: false (falso), imprecise (impreciso), verified (verificado)

name: la tercera fact-checking
ratingsystem: true (verdadero), false (falso)

name: observatorio de datos del periodismo y la comunicación
ratingsystem: true (verdadero), requires more explanation (requiere más explicación), denial (desmentido)- a reliable source denies this claim, untrustworthy (no confiable), false (falso),  no argument (sin argumentos)

name: cazadores de fake news
ratingsystem: true (verdadero), false (falso), misleading (engañoso), explanatory (aclaratoria), not verifiable (no verificable)

name: ecuador verifica
affiliation: Multiple media outlets, civil society organizations and universities,
ratingsystem: cierto (true); sí, pero (yes, but); inverificable (unverifiable); falso (false)

name: udla channel chequea
affiliation: Udla Channel, Universidad de las Américas (UDLA)
ratingsystem: color-coded, emoji-like icons represent the ratings: red for "false" (falso); orange for "questionable" (cuestionable); yellow for "true, but" (verdad. pero); and green for "true" (verdad).

name: #convocaverifica
ratingsystem: verdadero ("true"), falso ("false", discutible ("questionable"), engañoso ("misleading"), verdadero pero... ("true, but..."), no verificable ("not verifiable")

name: salud con lupa's comprueba ("verify")
ratingsystem: true, false

name: espaja

name: spondeo media
ratingsystem: a four-point scale -- true ("verdadero"), half ("a medias"), misleading ("engañoso"), false ("falso"). the ratings are also represented by neto (slang for someone who is considered honest or trustworthy), a cartoon lie-detector with emoji-like facial expressions and color-coded waves that shift from smiling (green) to angry (red) depending on a statement's accuracy.
notes: gf6 attendee. plans to add promise checking (~11/2019). 6/7/2019 email from martin: "our project is independent. the intention is for it to be commercial and for-profit. it was founded and currently funded by pablo and alejandro naim (they are my bosses). [ms: "grupo alnavi s. de l.r de c.v."???] they are two entrepreneur brothers... we are also considering applying to some grants, however most grant program requirements are not that friendly for new companies." ---- 9/21/20 announcement: https://spondeomedia.com/mensaje-importante/

name: verifcado 2018
ratingsystem: information that spread online was rated on its own scale: false, deceptive, you can not prove, true. for political fact-checks, the site relied on the methodology of the mexican fact-checking outlet el sabueso (see separate entry).

name: chilecheck
ratingsystem: true ("verdadero"), true, but... ("verdadero, pero..."), debatable ("discutible"), uncheckable ("inchequeable"), exaggerated ("exagerado"), misleading ("engañoso"), false ("falso"), folly ("disparate")
notes:
active? feb2018 kind of: "the partners are discussing in this moment how we'll face 2018. by march we believe we'll have a project running more or less with similar features as chile check 2017. we are deeply committed to this project and the opportunity of growing in its share. for example, we are designing a data unit that can add value to the newsrooms in turner. also planning a way to incorporate new sections (“the fact of the day”, “explanatory”, “true or false on social media”)  on the fact checking tv program."
the method we used can give you a hint of how we worked during 2017.
1. picking up candidate's statements, either in the public sphere or on shows aired either by cnn chile or chilevision. this was made by two editors. 
2. next morning, a comitee composed by the editors and the think tanks representatives select the final statements that were going to be checked.
3. a group of 4-6 reporters factcheck the statements and write a) a report to be presented in a meeting for the chilecheck tv show 2) the text for the website (which is edited by a web editor)
4. the tv show (a 24 minute program in cnn-chile, and a 10-minute segment in chilevision news) has a presenter and the two think tank representatives. these representatives are experts who use the checkers' report as the basis of their speech during the show.
two think-tanks: espacio público (an independent, center-left study center that aims to contribute to improving the debate, design and execution of public policies in chile), and instituto de estudios de la sociedad (another independent study center that conducts research on public issues in chile).
"to carry out the verifications, we use a methodology recognized internationally by the international factchecking network. we have been trained by chequeado, from argentina."

name: verificado uruguay
affiliation: Búsqueda, la diaria, El País, En Perspectiva, AFP, UYCheck,
ratingsystem: true ("verdadero"), falso ("false"), inexact ("inexacto") and misleading ("engañosa")
